children.heading: Agricultural commodity
children.label: 1 Agricultural commodity
children.text: The term “agricultural commodity” means any agricultural commodity (including livestock) in its raw or natural state.

children.heading: Agricultural commodity producer
children.label: 2 Agricultural commodity producer
children.text: The term “agricultural commodity producer” has the same meaning as the term “person” as prescribed by regulations promulgated under (before the amendment made by section 1703(a) of the Food, Conservation, and Energy Act of 2008).section 1308(e) of title 71See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “contributed importantly” means a cause which is important but not necessarily more important than any other cause.

children.heading: Determination of contributed importantly
children.label: B Determination of contributed importantly
children.text: The determination of whether imports of articles like or directly competitive with an agricultural commodity with respect to which a petition under this part was filed contributed importantly to a decline in the price of the agricultural commodity shall be made by the Secretary.

children.heading: Duly authorized representative
children.label: 4 Duly authorized representative
children.text: The term “duly authorized representative” means an association of agricultural commodity producers.

children.heading: National average price
children.label: 5 National average price
children.text: The term “national average price” means the national average price paid to an agricultural commodity producer for an agricultural commodity in a marketing year as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 6 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.
